request.description:
Returns a single conversation with full metadata, including `duration_seconds`, `transcript_count`, and HATEOAS `_links` (self, agent, transcripts, audio, delete).

**Auth:** `agent.view` permission required.

**Response:** `200 OK`
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "01JT...",
    "agent_id": "01JT...",
    "agent_name": "Support Agent",
    "channel": "web-widget",
    "external_session_id": "sess_a1b2c3d4e5f6",
    "status": "completed",
    "metadata": { "duration_seconds": 125.4, "termination_reason": null },
    "started_at": "2026-04-21T18:00:00+00:00",
    "ended_at": "2026-04-21T18:02:05+00:00",
    "duration_seconds": 125,
    "transcript_count": 12,
    "_links": { "self": {...}, "agent": {...}, "transcripts": {...}, "delete": {...} }
  }
}
```
